zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ward於大約1480年出生在英國爾卡培斯恩 煙雨 希丁頓時，他的父親Robert Warde II21歲，母親Anne Copperdick20歲。他於1495年與Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington在英國英格蘭爾卡培斯恩 煙雨 希丁頓結婚。他去世於1580年在英國諾福爾可費爾比享年101歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Ward于大约1480年出生在英国爾卡培斯恩 煙雨 希丁頓时，他的父亲Robert Warde II21岁，母亲Anne Copperdick20岁。他于1495年与Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington在英国英格兰爾卡培斯恩 煙雨 希丁頓结婚。他去世于1580年在英国諾福爾可費爾比享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

variants.name: Warshawsky
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Ari, Hyman.

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the city of Warsaw (Polish Warszawa), which became the capital of Poland at the end of the 16th century, after the destruction of Kraków by fire.
Americanized form of Polish Warszawski, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Wardman
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English wardman, either in the general sense ‘watchman, guard’ (compare Ward ) or in the administrative sense ‘representative of a ward within a borough’.

variants.name: Warde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ward was born about 1480, in Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert Warde II, was 21 and his mother, Anne Copperdick, was 20. He married Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington in 1495, in Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1580, in Filby, Norfolk, England, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Ward est né environ 1480, à Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Warde II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Anne Copperdick, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington en 1495, à Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1580, à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Ward um 1480 in Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Warde II 21 und seine Mutter Anne Copperdick 20. Er hat 1495 in Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington geheiratet. Er starb 1580 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Filby, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Ward è nato il circa 1480 nel Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Warde II, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Anne Copperdick, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington nel 1495, nel Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1580, nel Filby, Norfolk, England, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wardが約1480年にイギリスチェシュアイアカペスソルン ウィス シッドイントンで生まれた時，父Robert Warde IIは21歳，母Anne Copperdickは20歳であった。1495年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアカペスソルン ウィス シッドイントンでAnne Fitz Andrew Carringtonと結婚した。彼は1580年にイギリスノーフォルクフィルビーで101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Ward(이)가 대략 1480년 영국 체실르 캡스토른 위스 시딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Warde II(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Copperdick(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 캡스토른 위스 시딩턴에서 Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1580년 영국 노르폴크 피비에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Ward nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Warde II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Anne Copperdick, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington em 1495, em Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1580, em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 101 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ward родился около 1480 г. в местности капестаурн вит сиддингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Warde II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Anne Copperdick, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington в 1495 г. в местности капестаурн вит сиддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1580 г. в местности филби, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 101 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Ward nació aproximadamente 1480, en Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Warde II, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Anne Copperdick, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Anne Fitz Andrew Carrington en 1495, en Capesthorne with Siddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1580, en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 101 años.
